payload.topic: Here is my rough draft: 'The city planted more trees and solved heat risk.' Give me feedback on whether my evidence use matches the source.
payload.summary:
As we established earlier, I can help with feedback on your draft so you can keep your ideas and revise it in your own words.

Your statement, "The city planted more trees and solved heat risk," does not fully match the provided evidence in [S1-S3]. The text indicates that tree canopy coverage increased but does not claim that planting alone solved all local heat risks. It attributes changes to a

encryption.note: Encryption at rest is not yet implemented in this service revision. This record is plaintext but remains locally stored and inspectable.
